See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, selection procedure, pay scale in BPSC Stenographer Recruitment 2026.
Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) Bihar BPSC Stenographer Recruitment  2026 Bihar BPSC Advt No :  01/2026 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® Official : WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 12/01/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 02/02/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 02/02/2026 BPSC Stenographer Exam Date : 11/06/2026 Admit Card Available : 04/06/2026 Answer Key Available : 08/07/2026

BPSC Stenographer Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/08/2025 Minimum Age : 18 Years Maximum Age : 37 Male Maximum Age : 40 Female Age Relaxation Extra as per BPSC Stenographer Examination Rules Advt No 01/2026.

Sarkari Result® : How to Fill Bihar BPSC Stenographer Exam Online Form 2026 Bihar Public Service Commission BPSC Are Issued Stenographer Examination 2026. Notification and Invited Online Application Form for the BPSC Stenographer Recruitment 2026 Candidate Can Apply Online for 12/01/2026 to 02/02/2026. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the BPSC Latest Recruitment 2026 Application Form in Sarkari Result Recruitment Latest Job Section. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID, Thumb, Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
